svg.text: Spatial-first: the house as a grid of room cards, automations as their own cards. Everything below is generated from manifests — no layout state exists.
Släcker nere efter släcktid när ingen är hemma
zones.toml drives the tabs; rooms come from entity room fields
← home/health/**: state by shape + word, never color alone
commands leave at the manual band
constraint rendered and enforced on publish
collapsed rooms show a summary line
Wireframe — grayscale is deliberate; visual design is a later pass. All labels from [naming].sv.
